explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Known set effects were included.
Set bonus active: Black Scales of the Frost Lord Set 1 at 2 pieces (2/2 equipped).
Set bonus active: Ancestral Armor at 2 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Ancestral Armor at 4 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Ancestral Armor at 6 pieces (6/6 equipped).

Heroic Calanthia's Aegis of Dominance: Effect 1: Max Health +3,000 — feeds #2 Max Health; alternatives: Strength +20, Dexterity +20, Wisdom +20. Effect 2: Hit Chance +400 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Strength +20, Dexterity +20, Wisdom +20.

Heroic Calanthia's Regret: Effect 1: Evasion +220 — feeds #1 PvP Evasion; alternatives: Wisdom +11, Fortitude +11, Endurance +220. Effect 2: Max Health +1,650 — feeds #2 Max Health; alternatives: Wisdom +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220. Effect 3: Endurance +220 — feeds #3 PvP Endurance; alternatives: Wisdom +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220.

Heroic Eternal Promise: Effect 1: Evasion +220 — feeds #1 PvP Evasion; alternatives: Strength +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 2: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Strength +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 3: Endurance +220 — feeds #3 PvP Endurance; alternatives: Strength +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11.
Head: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Chest: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Hands: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Attack Defense Assist supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Attack Defense Assist supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
PvP Evasion: 28740 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.394; components PvP Melee Evasion 3,094, PvP Ranged Evasion 2,874, PvP Magic Evasion 2,900.
Max Health: 55890.622 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.152.
PvP Endurance: 11050 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.016; components PvP Melee Endurance 1,905, PvP Ranged Endurance 1,929, PvP Magic Endurance 1,105.
Damage Reduction: 462 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.006.
PvP Melee Hit Chance: 37844 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.074; minimum 30000 met.
PvP Melee Heavy Attack Chance: 18104 at priority 6; normalized contribution +0.001; minimum 14000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Sword and Shield mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Dagger mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
